abstract_catalog.name: txtView1
abstract_catalog.content: #@CCKCs.NET Blog io HK, which launched at 2026 in GitHub, is a individualise HTML/CSS/JS Blog web site page specializing in sharing a life and showcasing the future career of a person who are the bloger and contributing a long-term future plan also the dream of a person. The blog also offer a gateway to let the others can know more about how the person are and the skill, knowledge, dedication also the wishes of the blogger have.
abstract_catalog.name: txtView2
